commands.name: manage-apps
commands.title: Manage Apps
commands.description: Add, edit, remove, and activate Clerk instances

commands.name: switch-app
commands.title: Switch Active App
commands.description: Switch which configured Clerk instance is active

commands.name: search-users
commands.title: Search Users
commands.description: Search and manage users in the active Clerk instance

commands.name: search-organizations
commands.title: Search Organizations
commands.description: Search organizations and manage members in the active Clerk instance

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Clerk Menu Bar
commands.description: Show the active Clerk app and switch instances from the menu bar

commands.name: invitations
commands.title: Invitations
commands.description: View and manage invitations in the active Clerk instance

commands.name: access-lists
commands.title: Access Lists
commands.description: Manage allowlist and blocklist identifiers in the active Clerk instance

commands.name: overview
commands.title: Overview
commands.description: User and organization counts across configured Clerk instances

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
